interfaces.name: exec --json
interfaces.note: Primary deep-adapter surface. Emits JSONL events to stdout.

interfaces.name: app-server
interfaces.note: [experimental] per-action approval channel NOT confirmed; W1 decision gate (plan 3.4).

interfaces.name: exec-server
interfaces.note: [EXPERIMENTAL] standalone exec-server; per-action approval channel NOT confirmed.

per_action_approval.reason: codex exec --help has NO --ask-for-approval (verified by help text, see evidence/codex_exec_help.txt). The top-level --ask-for-approval is documented for the interactive TUI only. app-server/exec-server MAY expose a per-action channel but this is NOT run-loop-proven.

notes: approval_mode is declared sandbox_policy_only because codex exec (non-interactive) lacks a per-action approval flag; risk is bounded by the frozen --sandbox policy.

W1 decision gate (plan 3.4): spike app-server/exec-server for a stable per-action approval channel. If unproven, sandbox_policy_only stands and the UI must surface the difference vs Claude per_action (plan 5.2 exit standard).
